response.text:
I removed Meas 1, Meas 2, and Meas 3 successfully.

What the screen now shows:
- Measurement Results table now contains only:
  - Meas 4 — Eye Width on Ch 1, about 24.835 ns
- Left side:
  - Plot 2 is still the harmonics bar graph
  - Green bars with the blue fundamental bar
  - Scale labeled in dBuV
- Middle:
  - Plot 1 still shows the eye diagram for Meas 4
- Bottom:
  - Waveform view of CH1 is still displayed
- Right sidebar:
  - Meas 4 badge remains
  - Power 1 harmonics badge remains with:
    - Hcount 50
    - F1 Mag 168.8 mV
    - F3 Mag 180.4 mV
    - THD-F 208.4%
    - THD-R 90.15%
    - RMS 1.371 V
    - Freq 7.855 MHz

So only Meas 4 and Power 1 remain; Meas 1–3 are gone.
